display_name: PyPI Supply Chain — Compromised Package Registry
procedure_steps: BEFORE installing any pip/pip3 package, check the PyPI advisory registry for known compromised versions.
If the package+version matches a compromised entry, BLOCK the install and warn the agent.
If the package is listed but the version is safe, ALLOW but note the advisory.
If the package is not listed, ALLOW normally.
restrictions: NEVER install a compromised package version
ALWAYS check before pip install, pip3 install, poetry add, pdm add
If a compromised version is already installed, alert the operator immediately
notes: Compromised PyPI package registry. Queried by the package-install hook before any pip install. Advisory file at ~/.claude/hooks/pypi-advisories.json.
